summary: REQ-1 and REQ-4 appear implemented (new external auditions link with scarier presentation; Toys sneak peek card + dedicated hash route/page). REQ-2 and REQ-3 update the UI to reference the requested generated image paths, and Hell Hole sneak peek adds the Vicky’s Saw block. However, the diff summary does not show the required image assets being added under frontend/public/assets/generated. Several unrequested UI/theme changes also appear to have been made (background effects, hero/footer copy, and section behavior changes).

missing_requirements.requirement: Add the new AI-generated Clown Town interior elevation image as a static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated and reference it from the UI.
missing_requirements.reason: The UI was updated to reference /assets/generated/clown-town-interior-elevation-v2.dim_1600x900.jpg, but the diff summary does not show any new file added under frontend/public/assets/generated, so the asset itself cannot be verified as present.
evidence: File diff summary shows only one added file (a TSX page) and does not list any additions under frontend/public/assets/generated

missing_requirements.requirement: Add the AI-generated Vicky’s Saw scenic elevation image as a static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated and surface it in the Hell Hole sneak peek with title + professional-but-scary description.
missing_requirements.reason: The Hell Hole sneak peek page references /assets/generated/vickys-saw-scenic-elevation.dim_1600x900.jpg and includes title/description, but the diff summary does not show the image file being added under frontend/public/assets/generated, so the asset presence cannot be verified.
evidence: File diff summary does not list any added static asset files under frontend/public/assets/generated

hallucinated_features.description: Major HorrorBackground visual overhaul (chainsaw-themed background image layer, multiple animated layers, scanlines/noise/vignette effects).
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by any REQ (requirements focus on auditions link/copy, specific generated images, Toys sneak peek, and content copy rewrites).
evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt ("frontend/src/components/theme/HorrorBackground.tsx": enhanced fixed background with chainsaw-themed AI-generated image layer, animated layers, scanline effects)

hallucinated_features.description: Home hero section updated with new "Fire Remix" description paragraph highlighting 2028 show content.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by any REQ; changes go beyond the specified content updates (auditions, sneak peeks, specific scenic images, and static module copy rewrites).
evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt ("frontend/src/components/sections/HomeHeroSection.tsx": new Fire Remix energetic description paragraph)

evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt ("frontend/src/components/layout/SiteFooter.tsx": scary extreme haunt warning with liability disclaimer, attribution link)
